mentions.text:
I'm just talking about materials here, nothing about specific companies in this post.  

But in terms of the supply chain, rough est. of semi grade AlSiC looks like this:

CPS - 30.1% (United States)
Denka (TYO: 4061) - 18.7% (Japan)
Japan Fine Ceramics - 15.6% (Japan)
MC-21 - 12.1% (United States)
BYD - 11.4% (China)

It's interesting because BYD use it for EVs while CPS uses it for defense to high speed rails so just all over the board thermal applications usage so far (aside from AI yet).
